creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
I am calling this serious/high since upgrade to php5.2.1 is a 
security upgrade, and if you can't upgrade php extensions, you might be 
stuck.

if you go from 5.1.6 php to 5.2.1, you have no choice but to replace hph 
extenions.

you get this error when you try to make php5-extenions:
Unknown extension filter for PHP 5.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/php5-extensions.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/php5-extensions.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/lang/php5
make deinstall reinstall
cd /usr/ports/lang/php5-extentions
make deinstall reinstall
